title: GUARDIAN CIRCLE - 211info
text: ELYSIUM SANCTUARY GUARDIAN CIRCLE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Resources, outreach, and training connections are provided for those interested in becoming a resource parent, respite provider, or babysitter. Offers virtual support groups focused on sharing and self-care. Confidential Address Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Not applicable Email Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Adoption and Foster/Kinship Care Support Groups Foster Parent/Family Recruitment Parent to Parent Networking * Foster Parents Specialized Information and Referral * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
